text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's been a while since the Arima Kinen. While out
and about, I run into the three friendly rivals at a
fast-food restaurant.

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Me, me, me! I wanna eat melon! The orange type!

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
I'd like to get seafood—and maybe ride on one of
those sightseeing boats.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: What about you, Taishin?

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: I want to see drift ice. Like this.

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Whoa, that's so cool! You can do that there?!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I approach Winning Ticket and the others as they
browse a travel magazine.

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Oh, hi there, Trainer!
choice_data_list: Are you guys going on a trip?
Are you guys going on a trip?

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, to Hokkaido! We don't have any races
coming up, so now's our chance!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
Oh boy, I'm so excited for this! A trip with the
three of us! Fun trip, fun trip, going on a trip! ♪

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Do you really have to sing right now?

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
Come on! We hardly ever do stuff like this, you
know?

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
Pretty much all our group outings are for racing,
right?

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
That's why I'm so glad we'll be able to make lots
of fun memories off the track too!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: ...Well, we did agree to cool it for a while.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: Indeed, a temporary truce.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
By the way, it looks like if we want to do all the
things we'd like, two days and one night won't be
sufficient.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: We can skip the drift ice, then.

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
What? No way, we gotta go there! We'll just stay
longer!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: No, it's fine. We'll save some money that way too.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
I agree with Ticket this time. We don't often get
this chance, so it should be fun for all three of us.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: Let's take our time to see the sights.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Geez, you're pushy... Fine.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: Hehe, then it's decided!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
Yay! We're going to Hokkaido! Oh, also! We
should hit up Hakodate Racecourse!

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: Oh, that's a splendid idea.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Say that after checking the map!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Their cheerful chatter continues for quite a while.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: And then...

text_block_list.name: Ticket Fan
text_block_list.text: Um, excuse me... You're Winning Ticket, right?

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Hm? Oh, yes! That's me!

text_block_list.name: Ticket Fan
text_block_list.text:
Wow, this is amazing! It's really you! I saw you at
the Arima Kinen! I was sobbing when everyone
did the Tickezo call!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Aww, me too! Thank you—that makes me so happy!

text_block_list.name: Ticket Fan
text_block_list.text:
Um... Would it be okay to... take a picture with
you?

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Of course! Let's take a bunch!

text_block_list.name: Ticket Fan
text_block_list.text: Yay!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: All right, here goes! Say cheese!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: It's like this every day lately.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: Hehe, she's a proper celebrity.

text_block_list.name: Ticket Fan
text_block_list.text:
Whoa! Oh my gosh, it's all of BNW! I'm sorry, I
got so excited seeing Tickezo, I didn't notice the
rest of you!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
Why don't we all take a picture together? Come
on, you two, get in here!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
They look so great smiling together that I end up
taking an extra picture to put up in my office.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The three of them finish planning out their
itinerary.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Good, we've decided where to visit, found a
place to stay, and planned our travel routes...

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Now all we need are places to eat!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
On that note, they go to the bookstore to look
for a food travel guide.

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
Here we are! Now where would they have the
Hokkaido food guides?

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
Hey, forget that for a sec. Look at the stack of
books over there...

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: Winning Ticket's Journey Through the Twinkle Series. Ticket, did you publish a book?

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Wow, it's out already? Yeah, I did!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
But I didn't write it or anything! I just let them
take photos of me.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
That's quite the tome. "All of Nakayama
Racecourse is roaring. There are endless calls,
shouting 'Tickezo!'" Hmmm...

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Heh, look at this.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
"Favorite food: anything tasty! Favorite sport: all
of them!" You know those aren't actual answers,
right?

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
Whoa, wait... That's kinda embarrassing! Don't
read it out loud!

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, forgive us. I'm just excited to see you've
got your own book.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: ...Hm? "A word for your BNW rivals?" What's this?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After reading Winning Ticket's comment, they
quietly close the book.

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: H-huh? What's wrong?!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: ...Don't write stuff like that in a book.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Maybe I'll purchase one and read it in peace
later.

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: What? You're actually gonna buy it?!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
From a glance at the page, it seems like she wrote
them a pretty long, passionate, heartfelt
message.
